lessons.name: Unit 11: Electronic Devices
lessons.description: Learn about electronic devices with suggest/advise/recommend + V-ing or clause with should.

sections.heading: 1. Từ vựng (Vocabulary)
sections.content:
Electronic devices: smartphone, tablet, laptop, computer, desktop, smartwatch, e-reader, headphones, earphones, speaker, camera, drone

Features: screen, battery, charger, keyboard, mouse, touchscreen, wireless, Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, USB, memory, storage

Actions: charge, download, upload, install, delete, update, connect, disconnect, turn on, turn off, restart, reset

Problems: broken, damaged, crashed, frozen, slow, virus, malware, bug, error, glitch

sections.heading: 2. Luyện tập từ vựng
sections.content: Practice using vocabulary in context about electronic devices, features, and troubleshooting.

sections.heading: 3. Ngữ pháp (Grammar)
sections.content:
Suggest / Advise / Recommend + V-ing hoặc mệnh đề với Should

A. Suggest / Advise / Recommend + V-ing:

  • Cấu trúc: S + suggest/advise/recommend + V-ing
  • Ex: I suggest buying a new phone.
  • Ex: She advises studying hard.
  • Ex: They recommend visiting the museum.

B. Suggest / Advise / Recommend + (that) + S + should + V:

  • Cấu trúc: S + suggest/advise/recommend + (that) + S + should + V
  • Ex: I suggest (that) you should buy a new phone.
  • Ex: She advises (that) we should study hard.
  • Ex: They recommend (that) he should visit the museum.

C. Suggest / Advise / Recommend + (that) + S + V (subjunctive):

  • Cấu trúc: S + suggest/advise/recommend + (that) + S + V (nguyên mẫu không 'to')
  • Ex: I suggest (that) you buy a new phone. (không có 'should')
  • Ex: She advises (that) we study hard.
  • Ex: They recommend (that) he visit the museum.
  • Lưu ý: Cấu trúc này formal hơn, ít dùng trong giao tiếp hàng ngày

D. So sánh Suggest vs Advise vs Recommend:

  • Suggest: đề xuất, gợi ý (không mạnh)
  • Ex: I suggest going to the cinema.
  • Advise: khuyên, khuyên nhủ (mạnh hơn suggest)
  • Ex: The doctor advises taking medicine.
  • Recommend: giới thiệu, khuyến nghị (chuyên nghiệp)
  • Ex: I recommend buying this laptop.

E. Các cấu trúc KHÔNG đúng:

  • Sai: I suggest to buy a new phone. ✗
  • Đúng: I suggest buying a new phone. ✓
  • Sai: I suggest you buy a new phone. ✗ (thiếu 'should' hoặc 'that')
  • Đúng: I suggest (that) you should buy a new phone. ✓
  • Đúng: I suggest buying a new phone. ✓

F. Ví dụ chi tiết:

  • I suggest buying a new smartphone.
  • I suggest (that) you should buy a new smartphone.
  • She advises updating the software.
  • She advises (that) we should update the software.
  • They recommend charging the battery.
  • They recommend (that) he should charge the battery.

sections.heading: 4-11. Các phần còn lại
sections.content: Getting Started, A Closer Look 1-2, Communication, Skills 1-2, Looking Back, Project

problemTypes.name: Dạng 1: Suggest/Advise/Recommend + V-ing
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • S + suggest/advise/recommend + V-ing
  • Không dùng 'to V'

problemTypes.name: Dạng 2: Suggest/Advise/Recommend + (that) + S + should + V
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • S + suggest/advise/recommend + (that) + S + should + V
  • 'that' có thể bỏ

examples.question: I suggest (that) you ______ (should / buy) a new phone.
examples.solution: I suggest (that) you should buy a new phone.

examples.question: They recommend (that) he ______ (should / visit) the museum.
examples.solution: They recommend (that) he should visit the museum.

problemTypes.name: Dạng 3: Chuyển đổi giữa 2 cấu trúc
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • V-ing ↔ (that) + S + should + V
  • Chú ý thay đổi chủ ngữ

examples.question: I suggest buying a new phone. → I suggest (that) ______.
examples.solution: I suggest (that) you should buy a new phone.

examples.question: She advises (that) we should study hard. → She advises ______.
They recommend visiting the museum. → They recommend (that) ______.
examples.solution: They recommend (that) we should visit the museum.

problemTypes.name: Dạng 4: Sửa lỗi
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • Không dùng 'to V' sau suggest/advise/recommend
  • Dùng V-ing hoặc (that) + S + should + V

examples.question: Sửa lỗi: I suggest to buy a new phone.
examples.solution: I suggest buying a new phone. / I suggest (that) you should buy a new phone.
examples.explanation: Sửa: to buy → buying hoặc (that) you should buy

examples.question: Sửa lỗi: She advises to study hard.
examples.solution: She advises studying hard. / She advises (that) we should study hard.
examples.explanation: Sửa: to study → studying hoặc (that) we should study

examples.question: Sửa lỗi: They recommend you visit the museum. (thiếu 'should')
examples.solution: They recommend visiting the museum. / They recommend (that) you should visit the museum.
examples.explanation: Sửa: thêm 'should' hoặc đổi thành V-ing

exercises.question: I suggest ______ a new phone.
She advises ______ hard.
They recommend ______ the museum.
I suggest (that) you ______ buy a new phone.
She advises (that) we ______ study hard.
They recommend (that) he ______ visit the museum.
I suggest ______ the software.
The doctor advises ______ medicine.
I recommend ______ this laptop.
She suggests (that) you ______ charge the battery.
Which are correct structures? (Select all that apply)
options: I suggest to buy a phone.
I suggest (that) you should buy a phone.
I suggest you buy a phone.
exercises.explanation: Đúng: suggest + V-ing, suggest + (that) + S + should + V. Sai: suggest + to V, suggest + S + V (thiếu 'should')

exercises.question: Which verbs follow the same pattern? (Select all that apply)
exercises.explanation: Đúng: suggest, advise, recommend + V-ing hoặc (that) + S + should + V. Sai: want + to V

exercises.question: Which sentences are correct? (Select all that apply)
options: She advises (that) we should study hard.
She advises us to study hard.
exercises.explanation: Đúng: advise + V-ing, advise + (that) + S + should + V, advise + O + to V. Sai: advise + to V (thiếu tân ngữ)

exercises.question: Fill in: I suggest ______ (buy) a new phone.
Fill in: I suggest (that) you ______ (should / buy) a new phone.
Transform: I suggest buying a new phone. → I suggest (that) ______.
exercises.correct: you should buy a new phone / (that) you should buy a new phone

exercises.question: Correct: I suggest to buy a new phone. → I suggest ______.
Rearrange: suggest / I / buying / phone / new / a / . / advises / She / studying / hard / .
exercises.sample_answer: I suggest buying a new phone. She advises studying hard.

exercises.question: Transform: I suggest buying a new phone. → I suggest (that) you ______.
exercises.sample_answer: I suggest (that) you should buy a new phone.
exercises.explanation: Biến đổi: buying → (that) you should buy

exercises.question: Correct all errors: I suggest to buy a new phone. She advises to study hard. They recommend you visit the museum.
exercises.sample_answer: I suggest buying a new phone. / I suggest (that) you should buy a new phone. She advises studying hard. / She advises (that) you should study hard. They recommend visiting the museum. / They recommend (that) you should visit the museum.
exercises.explanation: Sửa: to buy → buying hoặc (that) you should buy; to study → studying hoặc (that) you should study; you visit → visiting hoặc (that) you should visit

exercises.question: Rearrange: suggest / I / that / you / should / buy / phone / new / a / . / advises / She / that / we / should / study / hard / .
exercises.sample_answer: I suggest (that) you should buy a new phone. She advises (that) we should study hard.
exercises.explanation: Sắp xếp: suggest/advise + (that) + S + should + V

exercises.question: Write two sentences with the same meaning using both structures: suggest + V-ing and suggest + (that) + S + should + V. Topic: updating software
exercises.sample_answer: I suggest updating the software. I suggest (that) you should update the software.
exercises.explanation: Viết 2 câu cùng nghĩa: suggest + V-ing và suggest + (that) + S + should + V
